channel.title: End2End Diffusion Blog
channel.description: Research notes, hypotheses, and findings on end-to-end diffusion training and visual representation learning.

item.title: Call for DiffusionBench: Holistic Benchmark for Diffusion Transformers
item.description: ImageNet alone is no longer sufficient for evaluating diffusion transformers. We are building DiffusionBench as a holistic alternative. An open call to help build it with us.
